allow: Bash(/opt/homebrew/bin/gh repo create whoiswho --public --description "WhoisWho — On-chain Guess Who for Starknet NFT collections. Built with React, Three.js, Zustand, starkzap and Cartridge Controller." --source=. --remote=origin --push)

Bash(python3.12 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\(''dependencies'',{}\), **d.get\(''devDependencies'',{}\)}; [print\(f''{k}: {v}''\) for k in sorted\(deps\) if any\(x in k for x in [''starknet'',''cartridge'',''starkzap'',''controller'']\)]")

Bash(git checkout --ours -- src/data/nftCharacterAdapter.ts src/starknet/config.ts src/starknet/hooks.ts src/starknet/sdk.ts src/store/gameStore.ts src/store/types.ts src/ui/AutoEliminatingOverlay.tsx src/ui/CharacterSelectScreen.tsx src/ui/GuessPanel.tsx src/ui/MenuScreen.tsx src/ui/QuestionPanel.tsx src/ui/ResultScreen.tsx src/ui/RiskItButton.tsx src/ui/UIOverlay.tsx src/ui/WalletButton.tsx package.json)
